name: Citron CLI & TUI Design System
description: Deterministic rules for terminal apps, TUIs, and AI chat CLIs. Aligned with Citron visual language: warm restraint, impeccable hierarchy, and parity with web semantics. Agents and humans implement the same spec — no guesswork.

alignment.rule: CLI is not a second-class UI. Reuse semantic meaning from web tokens; map to ANSI only at the render layer.

principles.name: Calm density
principles.rule: Prefer whitespace and alignment over borders. One strong accent (citron) per viewport; everything else is neutral or semantic status.

principles.name: TTY truth
principles.rule: Detect capabilities: isTTY, columns, color support (16 / 256 / truecolor), unicode width, emoji support. Degrade gracefully; never crash on dumb terminals.

principles.name: NO_COLOR is sacred
principles.rule: Honor NO_COLOR and CLICOLOR=0. When color is off, rely on weight, spacing, labels, and Unicode box drawing — never color as the only differentiator.

principles.name: One decision per beat
principles.rule: Do not stack unrelated questions. Finish one thought before the next. AI prompts: separate system context from user task visually and in copy.

principles.name: Immutable audit trail
principles.rule: For AI sessions, never mutate prior transcript styling retroactively. Append-only feel; corrections are new lines with clear attribution.

environment.rule: Hard-wrap prose at maxProseWidth for readability. Below minimumColumns: collapse side padding, hide non-essential chrome, prefer vertical lists over tables.

unicode.rule: Assume UTF-8. Test with Windows Terminal, iTerm2, Linux console. Provide ASCII fallbacks for box-drawing when unicode is unsupported.
unicode.preferredBoxDrawing: light single (┌─┐│└┘) for panels; heavy only for modal emphasis

stdoutStderr.rule: Human-facing frames, prompts, and branded output → stdout. Diagnostics, logs, machine-readable errors → stderr. Never interleave both in one logical block without a delimiter.

brand.usage: Headings, primary actions, key affordances, logo line

brandDim.usage: Secondary emphasis, dividers tinted to brand

text.usage: Default foreground on light terminal bg — if terminal is dark, invert via background detection or theme flag

success.usage: Positive completion — always pair with ✓ or OK label

error.usage: Failures, validation — pair with short imperative fix

inverse.usage: Inverted pills, high-contrast badges on supported themes

darkTerminalAdaptation.rule: When background is detected or forced dark, swap text to #fafaf7 and muted to #93928a; keep brand at #d9bc58 or #e8d38a for contrast.
darkTerminalAdaptation.never: Do not use #c4a030 on #1d1c19 without checking contrast; prefer citron-300/400 from tokens for dark-on-dark.

ansi256Fallback.rule: If truecolor unsupported, map to nearest xterm-256; if only 16 colors, map brand to yellow/bright-yellow, error to red, success to green, info to cyan, muted to bright black/gray.

stripMarkers.rule: Offer --no-color and respect env. Strip OSC sequences for logging to files.

devtoolsMode.description: Optional terminal palette when the CLI is explicitly in development or internal-tooling context. Matches web devtools tokens (cool blue slate). Not the product citron brand.
devtoolsMode.activateWhen: Explicit flag (e.g. INKBLOT_DEVTOOLS_CLI=1) or dev subcommand — never default for customer-facing binaries.

hierarchy.rule: Single H1 equivalent per screen: bold + brand color + 1 blank line below
Section headers: bold default color; optional brand left rule (│) in muted
Regular weight; 4–8 char left indent for nested explanations
Muted caps or small-caps sentence case; never shout
Monospace; pad inline code with single space; blocks: indented 2 + subtle left border character

wrapping.rule: Break at word boundaries; preserve leading indent on wrap; URLs may break with zero-width hints only if library supports
wrapping.lists: Hanging indent: marker column 2 chars + gap + body wraps aligned to body column

truncation.rule: Ellipsis … only at end; never truncate filenames mid-character without showing start and end (…foo.ts)
truncation.tables: Truncate cells with padEnd visible width; full value in footer line on narrow terminals

margins.rule: Consistent left margin for entire session; AI chat: same gutter for user and assistant

dividers.rule: No more than one strong divider per viewport height

alignment.tables: Header row separator mandatory; numeric columns right-align; text left; booleans center on ·/×
alignment.banners: Center only for splash / version; never center error text

panel.rule: Use box drawing for grouped settings, AI tool output, forms. Inner padding 1 line vertical, 2 chars horizontal minimum.
panel.title: Top border with optional centered title in muted; never empty top rule without label

callout.rule: Prefix line with variant tag [info] in semantic color; body indented; max 5 lines before fold with "… (+N lines)"

banner.rule: No animation on banner except optional one-shot fade via clear — avoid flicker

statusLine.rule: Dim; update in place only with full-width clear pattern to avoid jitter

primary.rule: Trailing space after chevron; label is short verb phrase: "Ask", "Command", "Path"

secondary.rule: Defaults in parentheses; capital letter shows default Enter behavior

password.rule: Echo mask • or nothing; never echo plaintext; on error re-prompt with reason only once before abort count

multiline.rule: Show delimiter line (e.g. CTRL+D to finish) in muted; preserve blank lines; strip trailing CR

validation.inline: Error on new line under field with ├─ prefix; success never noisy — optional single ✓ muted

textField.rule: Label ends with colon; required * in brand; screen reader: announce errors with role text if TUI lib supports

selectMenu.rule: Numbers or letters for options; current selection inverted or brand arrow ▸; show scroll hint if > 7 items
selectMenu.search: Filter line above list; no results state explicit

table.rule: Zebra optional; never required for clarity — alignment + header rule sufficient
table.sort: Indicator in header ▲▼ muted; default sort documented in footer

progress.determinate: Bar width = min(40, cols-4); use █ and ░ or smooth unicode blocks
progress.indeterminate: Spinner (see motion) or single-line cycling dots — not both
progress.eta: Show only when stable; hide if jitter > 20%

spinner.rule: One spinner per viewport; stop cleanly with space clear

toastInline.rule: Single line; prefix emoji only if unicode allowed; prefer text tag [ok]

confirmation.destructive: Red/error color word DELETE/RESET in message + require typed phrase or Y capital twice

wizard.rule: Step x of y in muted right or below title; allow back command consistent (:back)

emptyState.rule: Never blank screen with only cursor

errorPanel.rule: No stack traces in primary panel — stderr only

logStream.rule: Levels: DEBUG muted, INFO default, WARN warning color, ERROR error color; timestamps aligned column

keyLegend.rule: Footer: ^Q quit · ^S save · ? help; align keys; use · separator

goals: Surpass default Claude/OpenClaw terminal clutter: fewer ornaments, stronger hierarchy, faster scan
Make tool boundaries obvious without comic-book chrome
Preserve user focus: input area always visually anchored

sessionChrome.header: App name · model (muted) · context % or tokens optional right
sessionChrome.inputDock: Blank line + rule + prompt; never place user typing above transcript without scroll lock
sessionChrome.rule: On resize, reflow transcript; keep last user message and prompt visible

user.style: Bold label + indent body; brand chevron on continuation lines optional
user.rule: Never collapse user messages into assistant color

assistant.style: Default text; section subheadings muted; lists tight
assistant.rule: No fake personality filler; lead with answer

system.style: Muted frame; collapsible one-line summary + expand
system.rule: System prompts not shown by default in consumer mode

tool.expanded: Monospace panel; JSON pretty-print 2 spaces; max height with scroll
tool.rule: Green/red only for success/failure + text label

streaming.cursor: Dim block ▌ at end; remove on complete
streaming.partialMarkdown: Render incrementally where safe; code fence only when closing fence seen
streaming.stall: After 6s no token, show muted "Still thinking…" on same line once

composer.rule: Multi-line composer: delimiter visible; send shortcut in legend; show character soft limit warn at 80% in muted
composer.paste: Detect large paste; confirm before send if > threshold

markdownInTerminal.headings: H1 = bold + blank; H2 = bold; H3 = bold muted
markdownInTerminal.code: Fenced blocks: full width panel; line numbers optional muted
markdownInTerminal.links: OSC 8 hyperlinks if supported; else full URL on own line

citations.rule: Superscript numbers or bracket [1] in muted; sources listed compactly after message with dividers

safety.rule: When refusing, use neutral info color + clear reason + one alternative; never taunt or joke

copyTone.voice: Warm, precise, concise. Apple-adjacent calm, Citron-specific courtesy.
rules: Imperative for actions ("Run deploy"), sentence case for descriptions
Error copy: what broke + how to fix + optional why
No exclamation marks in system messages except genuine success milestone
Avoid "Something went wrong" — name the subsystem

keyboardAndShortcuts.rule: Document all global shortcuts in ? help; single-letter must not shadow readline without warning
keyboardAndShortcuts.accessibility: Provide long-form commands mirroring shortcuts (/help vs ?)

accessibility.contrast: Treat terminal background as unknown; test on black, white, and solarized; ensure brand not sole focus indicator
accessibility.colorBlind: Pair success/error with shape and words
accessibility.motion: CLIMOTION=0 or global flag disables spinner and progress animations
accessibility.screenReaders: When using a TUI library, expose labels; plain CLI: structured text is easier than canvas hacks

performance.rule: Batch redraws; throttle resize; avoid clearing entire screen each keypress
performance.aiStreaming: Chunk render max 60fps equivalent; coalesce tiny deltas

securityDisplay.secrets: Mask API keys, tokens, cookies in all output; never repeat full secret in confirm
securityDisplay.spoofing: Show remote host and identity on first connect in frame

versusDefaults: Fewer decorative Unicode characters than typical chat CLIs
Stronger alignment and padding than default inquirer
Clearer tool boundaries than unstructured log interleaving
Calmer color palette than rainbow debug modes
definitionOfDone: Every interactive flow has escape + help
AI session: roles visually distinct without garish borders

implementationNotes.libraries: Ink/blessed/react-ink/orchard — map this spec to component props; keep theme object as single source
implementationNotes.testing: Snapshot tests at 40, 72, 120 cols; golden files for NO_COLOR
implementationNotes.referenceCli: cli/citron-mascot.mjs follows NO_COLOR and truecolor for brand line
